inventory.name: Cave Water
inventory.description: Collected from a dripping ceiling. Cold. Clean, by the taste of it. Restores 2 HP. Clears the head.

room_def.name: The Room Without a Door
room_def.description: You turn around and the passage you came through is gone. Solid wall. One exit: forward. The wall behind you is warm and shows no seam.

items.name: Stonefather's Maul
items.description: A massive hammerhead on a short handle.  The stone it is made from is not stone from this world. It carries Thar's patience — and his severity.

room_def.name: The Prisoner's Cell
room_def.description: Iron bars. A thin mattress. Tally marks in the thousands. A figure that looks up.

room_def.name: The Counting Room
room_def.description: Someone has been in this room for a very long time, counting things. The walls are covered in tally marks, arranged in groups. In the corner: a fresh mark, made recently, in dust.

room_def.name: The Mirrored Ceiling
room_def.description: The ceiling is polished to reflectiveness. Looking up, you see the room below you — and a figure standing in it, looking up at you. The figure is you. The figure's room is the same as this one. The figure's expression is slightly different from yours.

items.name: Iron Shield
items.description: Heavy and dependable.

room_def.name: The Trapped Vault
room_def.description: A heavy iron door stands ajar. Inside, glittering objects. The flagstones look wrong.

room_def.name: The Handprint Chamber
room_def.description: A single handprint on the far wall. Pressed in dark pigment. No other marking. The handprint is not human-sized — just slightly wrong in its proportions. You stay longer than you intend to.

room_def.name: The Broken Altar
room_def.description: An altar split clean in two by force. Between the halves: a sealed cavity in the stone base.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

room_def.name: The Flooded Antechamber
room_def.description: Water to ankle depth, cold and perfectly still. The reflection shows the ceiling as it was: intact arches, lit sconces, a different time. Below the surface, something catches the light.

room_def.name: The Tilted Room
room_def.description: The floor slopes toward a drain. Not dramatically — but everything has gathered at the low end over centuries. You find yourself checking your pockets.

room_def.name: A Warm Room
room_def.description: The room is warm. No heat source. The warmth comes from the walls — as though the stone remembers something. It is not unpleasant. That is the most unsettling thing.

items.name: Vein-Sealer
items.description: Restores 50 HP. Hardens wounds against reopening.

enemies.name: Tomb Rat Swarm
enemies.death_line: The swarm disperses into dark cracks.

room_def.name: The Gambling Den
room_def.description: Three figures around a low table. Cards and coins between them. 'Room for one more.'

room_def.name: The Gallery of Faces
room_def.description: Carved faces at eye level — dozens, each different, each looking inward. All eyes closed. When you reach the centre, the faces behind you have their eyes open.

items.name: Voidhardened Vest
items.description: Treated with something from deep below. Resists drain.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

room_def.name: The Listening Room
room_def.description: Acoustically strange. Your footsteps sound far away. A murmur from the walls resolves, if you stand still enough, into voices. Not threatening. Not intelligible. Just present.

room_def.name: The Shrine of Eon
room_def.description: A stone altar: a serpent devouring its own tail. Candles burn without wax. The air is warm and patient.

room_def.name: The Whispering Library
room_def.description: Shelves of rotting tomes. One book lies open on a lectern, pages turning in no wind.

room_def.name: The Merchant's Alcove
room_def.description: A weathered merchant sits cross-legged on a rolled mat. His eyes are the wrong colour.

room_def.name: The Room of Clocks
room_def.description: A dozen timekeeping devices of Eldrosian make, all stopped at the same moment. The hands point to a time that means nothing to you. They meant something once.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: Cures poison.

room_def.name: The Dawn Chamber
room_def.description: A room lit by pale orange light with no source — the colour of the sky just before sunrise. On a flat stone at the far end: a small warm fragment.

room_def.name: The Ossuary
room_def.description: Bones stacked with care. Each skull has something placed in its eye sockets — all the same.

room_def.name: The Sealed Window
room_def.description: A window, underground, bricked from the other side. A crack at eye level. The light through it is a pale blue-white you have no name for.

room_def.name: The Scorched Corridor
room_def.description: The walls are black. The stone at the midpoint of this corridor is fused — melted and re-hardened. Something passed through here that was much hotter than fire.

items.name: Eldrosian Plate
items.description: Imperial-issue chest armour. The emblem has been scraped off.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: A mosaic floor, cracked but partially visible: a city from above, radiating from a central point.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: Splinters, but holds.

room_def.name: The Chamber of Reflections
room_def.description: A small square chamber where every surface is polished. The reflections are wrong. At the centre: a wooden stand, and on the stand, a mirror, face-down.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: Splinters, but holds.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

items.name: Null Plate
items.description: Armour that absorbs rather than deflects. Hits against it seem to matter less than they should.

room_def.name: The Cartographer's Station
room_def.description: A scholar's workspace — tools for mapping, rulers, inks, partial maps of the upper ruins pinned to a large flat table. Below a certain depth, the cartographer stopped.

room_def.name: The Inscription Room
room_def.description: A perfectly preserved chamber. Every surface covered in a single looping sentence. A dish of ash at the centre.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: The ceiling here is covered in carved stars. The constellations are not ones you recognise.

enemies.name: Animated Skeleton
enemies.death_line: The bones clatter apart. Silence returns.

room_def.ambient: A soft glow pulses from somewhere to the north, then is gone.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: Claw marks on the walls, at shoulder height, running in long continuous lines.

items.name: Rusty Sword
items.description: A blade worn by centuries. Still cuts.

items.name: Eldrosian Plate
items.description: Imperial-issue chest armour. The emblem has been scraped off.

room_def.ambient: You hear something skitter quickly away in the dark.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: A small chamber. The only remarkable thing is a single hook set into the wall at head height, very precisely.

items.name: Shadow Dagger
items.description: Light and fast. Made for the dark.

items.name: Warden's Coat
items.description: Heavy leather worked with iron rings. The coat of an Eldrosian official.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

room_def.name: The Vault Door
room_def.description: A chamber that exists only to contain a door. 'What the empire buried, the empire kept.'

room_def.name: The Hall of the Mural
room_def.description: A vast hall covered in a painted mural. Impossibly vivid. It depicts the beginning of things.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 15 HP.

enemies.name: Wraith
enemies.death_line: It unravels into cold air, whispering something.

room_def.name: The Warden's Archive
room_def.description: A door bearing the eye-and-scales emblem of the Warden's office. Records wait behind it.

room_def.name: The Veythari Door
room_def.description: A door of white stone etched with star-patterns. It glows from itself. The keyhole is shard-shaped.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: An archway carved with two figures flanking a circular door stands ahead. The door is solid stone.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 15 HP.

room_def.name: Chamber of Orrath
room_def.description: Darker than the others. The darkness has presence. A shape in the corner resolves into a figure.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: A wide gallery with empty frames on the walls — paintings removed, or destroyed. The frames are gilded.

room_def.name: The Mirror Chamber
room_def.description: Two surviving mirrors face each other. In the reflections: something that is not you.

room_def.name: The Dragon-Hall
room_def.description: A vault built for something immense. Something breathes at the far end. You feel its warmth from the doorway.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

items.name: Scale Armour
items.description: Worked from something's hide. Darker than iron, warmer than stone.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

items.name: Null Plate
items.description: Armour that absorbs rather than deflects. Hits against it seem to matter less than they should.

items.name: Rusty Sword
items.description: A blade worn by centuries. Still cuts.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 15 HP.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

items.name: Strong Tonic
items.description: A thick, bitter draught. Restores 25 HP.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: A room with no features except a drain in the centre of the floor. The drain goes very deep.

enemies.name: Tomb Rat Swarm
enemies.death_line: The swarm disperses into dark cracks.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: The room is dominated by a single stone table, cracked down the middle. Tools are still laid on it.

items.name: Strong Tonic
items.description: A thick, bitter draught. Restores 25 HP.

room_def.name: The Empty Throne
room_def.description: A throne room, grand in ruin. The throne itself is intact. Something about it resists you.

room_def.name: The Hollow Wall
room_def.description: A room with one sealed wall — perfectly flat, no seams. A circular indentation at its centre.

room_def.name: Chamber of the Near-Mortal
room_def.description: Cleaner air. Silver-threaded script on the walls. A figure stands at the far end.

room_def.name: The Well of Stars
room_def.description: No ceiling — or rather, a ceiling that is open sky: stars visible, unmoving, underground.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: Standard-issue steel. Reliable.

items.name: Shadow Dagger
items.description: Light and fast. Made for the dark.

room_def.name: The Sealed Sanctum
room_def.description: A door of pale stone. No hinges, no handle. Ash-coloured runes that absorb light.

room_def.name: The Throne of Eldros-Verath
room_def.description: A grand chamber, not ruined — arrested. Something happened here and everything stayed where it fell.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 15 HP.

room_def.name: The Hall of the Nine
room_def.description: A circular hall. Nine alcoves are set into the walls at equal intervals, each carved with a different symbol older than the empire. A mosaic of nine circles covers the floor. The golden centre has been pried out.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: An archway carved with two figures flanking a circular door stands ahead. The door is solid stone.

enemies.name: Tomb Rat Swarm
enemies.death_line: The swarm disperses into dark cracks.

room_def.name: Talarion's Room
room_def.description: A scholar's room — desk, shelves, the remnants of a life spent writing. Someone worked here for a very long time and left deliberately.

room_def.name: The Warden Bell
room_def.description: A room with a large dark bell standing in the centre, covered in a thick layer of dust.

room_def.name: The Hall of the Shattered Crown
room_def.description: Cruder stonework than the rest — this room was built after the fall. The walls depict a war fought across three generations. At the centre: a stone plinth.

room_def.name: The Veythari Sanctuary
room_def.description: Silver light from the walls themselves. A pool of still water. A pale tree, leafless, its branches holding small cold lights that do not flicker.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

enemies.name: Giant Spider
enemies.death_line: The spider curls into itself. Venom smell lingers.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps descend into the next level of the ruins. The air below is colder, or older, or both.

room_def.name: The Blood Door
room_def.description: A door of dark red stone, warm to the touch. The keyhole is organic in shape.

room_def.name: The Well Chamber
room_def.description: The stairs end here. A circular chamber of absolute silence. In its centre: a well of solid darkness.

room_def.name: The Ritual Chamber
room_def.description: A circular room with a domed ceiling. In the centre: a stone dais, carved with the nine-circle diagram of the wells. The dais has a hollow at its centre — shaped precisely like a collection of fragments pressed together.

room_def.name: The Sealed Sanctum
room_def.description: A door of pale stone. No hinges, no handle. Ash-coloured runes that absorb light.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: Water runs through a crack in the far wall, pooling somewhere below the flags.

room_def.name: The Deep Market
room_def.description: A figure behind a low table. No candles — the stock is lit by something the items themselves emit. They do not look up when you enter.

room_def.name: The Chamber of the Agreement
room_def.description: The air here is wrong. Not cold — wrong. As though the air itself remembers something that happened in this room and cannot stop remembering it. On the floor: a perfect circle, scorched into the stone, that no amount of time has faded.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: Torchlight — somehow still burning — flickers across walls of imperial script you cannot read.

items.name: Strong Tonic
items.description: A thick, bitter draught. Restores 25 HP.

room_def.ambient: A faint smell of old wax drifts from somewhere ahead.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: The room is perfectly square. Four identical arches stand in each wall. Three are bricked over.

enemies.name: Atraxis Fragment
enemies.death_line: The fragment tears itself apart. The pieces do not fall — they drift, slowly, as though gravity has an opinion about this but is choosing not to enforce it.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: Water runs through a crack in the far wall, pooling somewhere below the flags.

enemies.name: Corrupted High Priest
enemies.death_line: The priest collapses. Something leaks from the wounds that is not blood. The robes continue to move for a moment after the body is still.

room_def.name: Chamber
room_def.description: A mosaic floor, cracked but partially visible: a city from above, radiating from a central point.

items.name: Eldrosian Spear
items.description: Etched with imperial sigils. Old, perfectly balanced.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 15 HP.

enemies.name: Goblin Archer
enemies.death_line: The archer topples from its perch.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

items.name: Ashbound Coat
items.description: Treated in the ash of the inscription room. Resists curses. The treatment does not wash out.

enemies.name: Corrupted Sentinel
enemies.death_line: Eldrosian markings fade from its breastplate as it stills.

room_def.name: Staircase
room_def.description: Stone steps lead upward. The light above is different from the light below.

items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: Standard-issue steel. Reliable.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 15 HP.

visited.2,1,3: The Hall of the Shattered Crown
